summary: Iteration 46: In-Charge Self-Approval Workflow Backend Testing - 16/16 tests PASSED (100%). All 8 requested features verified working correctly.

frontend_issues.note: Frontend testing skipped per request (React Native/Expo app, not web frontend)

critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 (In-Charge creates procedure via POST /api/procedures): PASS - Procedure created with created_by_role='implant_incharge', created_by_id, created_by_name populated correctly
Feature 2 (In-Charge requests Phase 1 approval via POST /api/procedures/{id}/request-phase1-approval): PASS - Status changes from 'draft' to 'pending_phase1'
Feature 3 (In-Charge self-approves Phase 1 via POST /api/procedures/{id}/approve): PASS - Both supervisor_phase1_approved and implant_incharge_phase1_approved set to True automatically
Feature 4 (After Phase 1 self-approval, status='phase1_approved'): PASS - Status correctly transitions to 'phase1_approved'
Feature 5 (In-Charge submits Phase 2 via POST /api/procedures/{id}/submit-phase2): PASS - Status changes to 'pending_phase2'
Feature 6 (In-Charge self-approves Phase 2, status='phase2_approved'): PASS - Both supervisor_phase2_approved and implant_incharge_phase2_approved set to True automatically
Feature 7 (Supervisor listing excludes in-charge-created cases): PASS - GET /api/procedures for supervisor does NOT return procedures with created_by_role='implant_incharge'
Feature 8 (In-Charge listing includes all cases): PASS - GET /api/procedures for in-charge returns all procedures including self-created ones

success_rate.frontend: N/A (skipped per request - React Native app)

seed_data_creation: Test procedures created with 'TEST_' prefix were cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: In-Charge self-approval workflow fully verified. Key findings: 1) In-Charge (Abhijit.patil) can create procedures with created_by_role='implant_incharge'. 2) In-Charge can request Phase 1 approval and self-approve (auto-approves both supervisor and incharge roles). 3) After Phase 1 self-approval, status becomes 'phase1_approved'. 4) In-Charge can submit Phase 2 and self-approve (auto-approves both roles). 5) After Phase 2 self-approval, status becomes 'phase2_approved'. 6) Supervisor listing (GET /api/procedures) correctly excludes in-charge-created cases (created_by_role != 'implant_incharge'). 7) In-Charge listing includes all cases. Code locations verified: server.py lines 2254-2283 (Phase 1 self-approval), lines 2391-2407 (Phase 2 self-approval), lines 960-970 (supervisor listing exclusion).

tested_features.supervisor_listing_excludes_incharge_cas: PASS - No implant_incharge-created cases in supervisor listing
tested_features.incharge_listing_includes_all_cases: PASS - In-charge can see all cases including self-created

tested_endpoints.POST /api/auth/login: 200 - Both In-Charge and Supervisor authenticate correctly
tested_endpoints.POST /api/procedures: 200 - In-Charge creates procedure with correct created_by fields
tested_endpoints.GET /api/procedures/{id}: 200 - Returns procedure with correct status and approval flags

verified_code_locations.incharge_procedure_creation: server.py lines 894-910: Sets created_by_role='implant_incharge', created_by_id, created_by_name
verified_code_locations.phase1_self_approval: server.py lines 2254-2283: is_incharge_self_created check auto-approves both roles
verified_code_locations.phase2_self_approval: server.py lines 2391-2407: is_incharge_self_created check auto-approves both roles
